name: Perplexity AI
description: Query Perplexity AI models that combine LLM reasoning with real-time web search. Get cited, up-to-date answers on any topic.

auth.hint: Generate an API key in your Perplexity account settings at perplexity.ai/settings/api.

tools.name: search_and_answer
tools.description: Ask a question and get an AI-generated answer with web citations. Uses sonar models for online search.

params.name: search_recency_filter
params.description: Limit search to: month, week, day, or hour

params.name: return_citations
params.description: Include source URLs in the response
